name: Search
description: Tenant-scoped full-text search over arbitrary content. Owning modules push documents (title/body/url/metadata keyed by entityType+entityId); the default PostgreSQL FTS provider ranks results with ts_rank and returns ts_headline snippets. Provider abstraction leaves room for Meilisearch/Elastic. All queries are parameterized and tenant-scoped.
author: Kuray Karaaslan
